name: 250.000 tokens total || The incredibly detailed world of Occulus Patris
description:
(All of the maps where manually drawn by me using Procreate, I authorize any use you may want to give them)

Yep, you read that right. Welcome to Occulus Patris, a 19th century inspired Fantasy World going through a magical industrial revolution. And I am here to post this extremely high effort bot.

This world is an original creation of my own, no AI used ALL WRITTEN BY HAND btw, that took me four full months to write. The autism is strong in me I know. And with the power of Lorebooks I can arrange this massive text in a way so its playable with conventional LLMs like Deepseek.

The world has a consistent lore that expands across 50000 years and it is not mere window dressing as it is why nations, monsters and cultures are the way they are. Each place on the world is designed to truly feel alive.

Specific Breakdown on the Contents of the lore:

  • A fully fledged Hard Magical System with clear rules that exist for more than just cool tricks. It has shaped the world forever and it is the source of the ongoing Mana Industrial Revolution.

  • 4 Continents (with many biomes on each one)

  • 18 different independent factions. Each one has great things and moral failings, keeping a realistic tone. The nations aren't just set dressing. They have detailed histories, economies, political factions, military doctrines, and clashing ideologies. You can expect a nation to have a unique flag, government, location in the world, special organizations (corporations, government branches…), history, demographics, religious affiliation, culture, data on its economy and technology, how mages and magic are integrated, pets and animals, clothing, food, architecture, military (weaponry, uniforms, ship models and army composition), NPCs, terrain locations, landmarks, fully detailed cities with their own demographics, infrastructure, architecture, location, special buildings and monuments, colonies (if they have any) and monster fauna.

  • Great effort specially was placed into making all cultures truly different and engaging, some may be familiar while others completely alien and incomprehensible to human logic.

  • 27 Different places.

  • Many human ethnicities and fantasy races. (Don’t worry, I already know that you will be playing as a human 19th century swordsman.)

  • Dozens of NPCs.

  • Good optimization, I have done a lot of testing and optimization so the AI can run it correctly.

TIPS FOR A BETTER EXPERIENCE:

(This is information I have obtained after thoroughly play-testing this bot as I was optimizing it.)

  • You need high token context to even play it, minimum 60000. You will be loading very heavy lorebooks, as some nations can have over 10 thousand tokens worth of lore. The bo
creator: Momento usuarium
